task: Find an energetic hairless dog with medium barking.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by using AKC breed filters and breed pages to identify hairless dogs with medium barking, then narrowing to the energetic ones. Evidence: the filtered AKC results page at https://www.akc.org/dog-breeds/?barking_level%5B%5D=medium&coat_type%5B%5D=hairless visibly showed the matching hairless + medium-barking breeds: American Hairless Terrier, Chinese Crested, Peruvian Inca Orchid, and Xoloitzcuintli. Then the agent extracted embedded AKC breed-page scores showing Peruvian Inca Orchid and Xoloitzcuintli each had energy_level_score 4 and barking_level_score 3, while the others had energy 3. The final answer correctly reported Peruvian Inca Orchid and Xoloitzcuintli as energetic hairless dogs with medium barking, supported by AKC page evidence.
final_result_response:
I found the best matches on AKC:

**Energetic hairless dogs with medium barking:**

1. **Peruvian Inca Orchid**  
   - Energy score: **4/5**
   - Barking score: **3/5**, medium
   - AKC describes it as “Agile, smart and swift” and says the breed can be hairless or coated. <citation refs="fetch_call_jv0dYDZd49ZYImPWffOY8ows|fc_00f84465c14d4036016a051c5b2f488199984a973faf18443f#1">“Agile, smart and swift, the Peruvian Inca Orchid... The breed can be hairless or coated...”</citation>

2. **Xoloitzcuintli**
   - Energy score: **4/5**
   - Barking score: **3/5**, medium
   - AKC says it comes in hairless or coated varieties. <citation refs="fetch_call_Er2l331KSSEqLDnXcjQiHuKM|fc_00f84465c14d4036016a051c5b2f508199b7861df996c5689f#1">“The alert and loyal Xolo comes in three sizes, and in either hairless or coated varieties.”</citation>

The filtered AKC result set for **Hairless + Medium barking** also included American Hairless Terrier and Chinese Crested, but their energy scores were **3/5**, so they are less “energetic” than the two above.
action_history: Opening AKC website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.akc.org/');
Opening AKC breed match: await page.locator('e55').click();
Starting breed selector quiz: await page.locator('e17').click();
Opening AKC dog breeds page: await openTab('https://www.akc.org/dog-breeds/');
Opening activity filter: await page.locator('e21').click();
Applying AKC filters: await page.locator('button:has-text("Submit")').click();
Expanding barking level filter: await page.locator('e22').click();
Expanding coat type filter: await page.locator('e24').click();
Selecting medium barking and hairless coat: await page.locator('e215').click();
Selecting medium barking and hairless coat: await page.locator('e219').click();
Force selecting visible filter labels: await page.locator('e215').click({force:true});
Force selecting visible filter labels: await page.locator('e219').click({force:true});
Selecting AKC dog filters: await page.locator('label:has(input[name="activity_level[]"][value="regular-exercise"])').click();
Selecting AKC dog filters: await page.locator('label:has(input[name="barking_level[]"][value="medium"])').click();
Selecting AKC dog filters: await page.locator('label:has(input[name="coat_type[]"][value="hairless"])').click();
Applying filters directly: await page.locator('button:has-text("Submit")').click();
Triggering filter label clicks: if (!input.checked) label.click(); else { input.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true})); }
Triggering filter label clicks: await page.evaluate(() => document.querySelector('button[type="submit"]')?.click());
Opening filtered AKC breed results: await openTab('https://www.akc.org/dog-breeds/?activity_level%5B%5D=regular-exercise&barking_level%5B%5D=medium&coat_type%5B%5D=hairless');
Opening hairless and medium-barking results: await openTab('https://www.akc.org/dog-breeds/?barking_level%5B%5D=medium&coat_type%5B%5D=hairless');
